Furnished Rental
Los Angeles 90035

9432 & 9430 Oakmore Rd — fully furnished 5-bedroom compound in Beverlywood. Heated pool, spa, guest house. Available from 30 days. $34,999/month.

Inquire Now Property Details

Fully Furnished Luxury Rental — Los Angeles 90035

9432 & 9430 Oakmore Rd is a fully furnished luxury rental in Los Angeles ZIP code 90035 (Beverlywood), available for short-term leases starting at 30 days and long-term leases up to 12+ months. The property is move-in ready with curated luxury interiors — no additional furniture, equipment, or setup required.

The compound totals 4,492 sq ft across the main 5-bedroom residence and a detached ~400 sq ft guest house with a private entrance. Monthly rent is $34,999/month, inclusive of all furnishings, heated pool and spa, steam sauna, dual-oven chef's kitchen, EV charging, smart home systems, and Ring security.

ZIP code 90035 (Beverlywood) is one of the most desirable furnished rental locations in Los Angeles, offering Beverly Hills-adjacent prestige at a relative value versus 90210. The neighborhood is walkable to Pico-Robertson dining, 5 minutes to Beverly Hills, and 15 minutes to LAX.

What's Included — Fully Furnished

Main Residence

  • →5 bedrooms · 5.5 bathrooms
  • →Curated luxury furniture & art
  • →Chef's kitchen: dual ovens, island
  • →Steam sauna in primary suite
  • →Hardwood & Italian porcelain floors
  • →Smart home, multi-zone HVAC
  • →Blackout shades, smart lighting

Outdoor & Systems

  • →Heated pool & spa (gas-heated)
  • →Gated driveway · automatic gate
  • →Ring security system
  • →EV charging station
  • →In-unit washer/dryer
  • →Water conditioner & purifier
  • →Walk-in closets, decorative fireplace

Guest House

  • →~400 sq ft · private entrance
  • →Full kitchen & full bathroom
  • →Separately metered utilities
  • →Included in lease (cannot be sublet)
  • →Ideal for staff, guests, or office

Lease Terms

  • →Minimum 30 days
  • →Short-term & long-term welcome
  • →$34,999/month fully furnished
  • →Security deposit: $34,999
  • →Tenant pays: utilities, pool, garden
  • →Pets considered case by case

Furnished Rental 90035 — FAQ

Where can I find a fully furnished luxury rental in Los Angeles 90035? +

9432 & 9430 Oakmore Rd in Beverlywood (90035) is the premier furnished luxury rental in this ZIP code — a 5-bedroom, 4,492 sq ft gated compound available from 30-day minimum at $34,999/month, fully furnished and move-in ready.

What is included in the furnished rental at 9432 Oakmore Rd? +

All furniture, linens, cookware, smart home systems, heated pool and spa, steam sauna, EV charging, Ring security, and the fully furnished guest house. Tenants pay utilities (electricity, gas, water, internet) and pool/garden maintenance.

Is a short-term furnished rental available in Los Angeles 90035? +

Yes. 9432 Oakmore Rd accepts leases starting at 30 days, making it suitable for executive relocation, production housing, FIFA 2026 seasonal rental, or medical stays near Cedars-Sinai.

What is the price for a furnished luxury rental in Beverlywood? +

$34,999/month for the entire 4,492 sq ft gated compound including the detached guest house, heated pool, and all amenities listed above.
